pr.title: Rebrand to Harvester / emerald Nexus and regenerate mockup series
pr.body: ## Summary - Rebranded the login wordmark, launch sequence, and sidebar to read **HARVESTER** with **NEXUS** in smaller emerald-green letters underneath. - `LoginScreen.tsx`: replaces the `ELEVATE` wordmark with `HARVESTER` and adds an emerald `NEXUS` subline above the existing underlight, keeping the original animated letter rhythm. - `LaunchSequence.tsx`: launch loading screen now stacks `HARVESTER` with an emerald `NEXUS` subline. - `App.tsx` + `styles.css`: sidebar brand shows `Harvester` as the title with an emerald `NEXUS` sub and the original tagline preserved underneath. Brand icon flipped to `HX`. - Emerald color uses a darker tone (`#1f7a52`) with a soft green glow rather than a bright/teal hue. - Added `scripts/record-mockups.mjs` so the three-part walkthrough series can be regenerated deterministically; raw output lands in the gitignored `artifacts/mockups/`, while final MP4 + poster PNGs are committed to `docs/mockups/` for serving via GitHub raw URLs. ## How to regenerate locally ```bash npm install npx playwright install chromium npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 & node scripts/record-mockups.mjs ``` Optional follow-up to produce `.mp4` + poster `.png` next to each `.webm` and copy into `docs/mockups/`: ```bash cd artifacts/mockups for f in *.webm; do base="${f%.webm}" ffmpeg -y -i "$f" -movflags +faststart -pix_fmt yuv420p \ -vf "scale=trunc(iw/2)*2:trunc(ih/2)*2" -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -crf 22 "${base}.mp4" ffmpeg -y -ss 1.0 -i "$f" -frames:v 1 -q:v 2 "${base}.png" done cp *.mp4 *.png ../../docs/mockups/ ``` ## Test Plan - PASS: `npm test` (6 files, 19 tests) - PASS: `npm run build` - PASS: `node scripts/record-mockups.mjs` produced 3 videos (~17s / ~19s / ~27s) with the updated branding ## Mockup series (GitHub-hosted raw URLs) ### 1. Login → HUD dashboard menu sweep - Video (MP4): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/01-login-dashboard-menu.mp4 - Poster (PNG): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/01-login-dashboard-menu.png ![Login → HUD dashboard menu](https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/01-login-dashboard-menu.png) ### 2. Resource monitoring + live security audits - Video (MP4): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/02-resource-monitoring-security.mp4 - Poster (PNG): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/02-resource-monitoring-security.png ![Resource monitoring + security audits](https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/02-resource-monitoring-security.png) ### 3. Cluster console + machine wizard + manifest wizard - Video (MP4): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/03-cluster-machine-wizard.mp4 - Poster (PNG): https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/03-cluster-machine-wizard.png ![Cluster + machine wizard](https://github.com/sggr57a/harvester-nexus/raw/cursor/regenerate-mockups-4fac/docs/mockups/03-cluster-machine-wizard.png) [Slack Thread](https://athome-ks56182.slack.com/archives/D0B5253H6CD/p1779586414325799?thread_ts=1779586414.325799&cid=D0B5253H6CD)
pr.author: sggr57a
